niche: Spray Foam Insulation Contractor Insurance — Miami / South Florida
geo: Miami-Dade, Broward, Palm Beach, Monroe (Keys), and statewide Florida
paa_questions: Does general liability cover spray foam isocyanate claims in Florida?
Why is contractor insurance so expensive in South Florida right now?
Do spray foam contractors need contractors pollution liability?
Can I get insurance if I work in the HVHZ / Miami-Dade?
How do I insure my spray rig against hurricane damage?
Is workers comp required for spray foam crews in Florida?
What is named storm deductible and does it affect my business?
Can you insure a contractor who has been dropped by Citizens or another carrier?
intent_notes: South FL is a hardening insurance market; many SPF contractors are non-renewed by coastal carriers after hurricane-season losses. Strong intent around placement of hard-to-place risks, hurricane/windstorm exposure, and humidity/mold completed-operations claims. CPL remains the #1 differentiator statewide.
